reason: Tests assert exact variable names ('MAX_CASCADING_UPDATES', 'cascadingUpdateCount') and exact error strings ('infinite loop detected') in source code. Passing behavior_in_task_description requires adding these literals to instruction.md, but doing so enables string-search cheating and fails anti_cheating_measures. The root issue is test design: solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text are both fail due to text-based exact-match assertions. Tests need rewrite, not instruction.
